name: unimts
paper_title: UniMTS: Unified Pre-training for Motion Time Series
authors: Xiyuan Zhang, Diyan Teng, Ranak Roy Chowdhury, Shuheng Li, Dezhi Hong, Rajesh K. Gupta, Jingbo Shang
venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2024
license: Paper: CC BY 4.0 (arXiv). Code repo: no LICENSE file present (unknown).
notes: Zero-shot 'cosine tier' baseline: an ST-GCN over a 22-node SMPL skeleton graph contrastively aligned to a fine-tuned CLIP ViT-B/32 text tower (shared 512-d space). Zero-shot HAR = cosine similarity between a window's IMU embedding and each label string's text embedding. Released weights (HF xiyuanz/UniMTS, checkpoint/UniMTS.pth) are ACCELEROMETER-ONLY (in_channels=3; gyro/stft branches OFF, verified from the checkpoint) and expect 20 Hz, m/s^2 WITH gravity, no per-window normalization. Input tensor is (N, C=3, T=200, V=22, M=1): one physical IMU is written into ONE SMPL joint's 3 accel channels, the other 21 joints zero-filled. Original SEED code URL github.com/xiyuanz/UniMTS is a typo (404); correct repo github.com/xiyuanzh/UniMTS. HF username 'xiyuanz' differs from GitHub 'xiyuanzh'.
